creator: olivierd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Xfce4-terminal 0.8.0 is built against Gtk3 and Vte3, so install Gtk theme compatible with Gtk >= 3.18.
Ideally x11-themes/gnome-themes-standard, x11-themes/greybird-theme or x11-themes/numix-theme.

Note: Themes available in Xfce (gtk-xfce-engine) work only with Gtk2, not Gtk3.
